question: How do I create my first product?
answer: Navigate to Products & Services in the sidebar, then click 'New Product'. Fill in the product name, type, and pricing details. Your product will be available immediately for linking and referrals.

question: How do Affiliate links work?
answer: Go to Affiliate Portal → Generate Link. Select a product and click Generate. Share the unique link with your audience. Each click and conversion is tracked in real time under Affiliate Portal → My Links.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: Owners can add team members under Settings → Users & Roles. Assign roles such as Partner, Reseller, or Influencer. Each role has scoped permissions as documented in the Roles guide.

question: When are commission payments processed?
answer: Commissions are processed on the 1st and 15th of every month. You must have a minimum balance of ZMW 100 to trigger a payout. Payments are sent to the bank account registered under your profile.

question: What payment methods are supported?
answer: We support Zambian bank transfers, Airtel Money, MTN Mobile Money, and Visa/Mastercard debit cards. Add or update your payment method in Settings → Billing.

question: How is VAT calculated on my commissions?
answer: VAT at the standard Zambia rate (16%) is automatically deducted before payout. Your monthly payout statement includes a full VAT breakdown for your records.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings → Security and toggle on 'Two-Factor Authentication'. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator) and confirm with a one-time code.

question: I forgot my password. What do I do?
answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email and we'll send a reset link. The link expires in 30 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

question: Can I have multiple accounts?
answer: Each email address may only be associated with one CompanyApp account. If you need access under a different company, contact support to set up a separate company workspace.

question: What products can I create referral links for?
answer: You can generate referral links for any active product listed in your Products & Services page. Pre-loaded system products (School Management, Payroll, Legal, etc.) are available by default.

question: How is a 'conversion' counted?
answer: A conversion is recorded when someone uses your referral link to complete a paid subscription sign-up. Free trials are counted as leads, not conversions, until they upgrade to a paid plan.

question: Can I share a referral link on social media?
answer: Yes. Use the Share buttons on the Generate Link page to post to WhatsApp, Facebook, or copy the link. Each platform is tracked separately in your link analytics.
